Notes: UW-L's 10th straight win over UW-P...Game tied 7 times in 1st half...UW-P
starts 2nd half on 9-0 run, leads 42-30 w/ 10:28 left, UW-L goes on 24-3 run..
Cramer (UW-L) 14 pts in run...UW-P gets no closer than 5 the rest of the game.
Cramer (UW-L) career-high 18 pts, 16 in 2nd half...Poad (UW-P) 18 pts.
Game.Officials: Mark Woelfel,  Ralph Sirmons,  Duane Ives
